interfaces.name: ProjectID
interfaces.signature: struct ProjectID: Hashable, Codable, Sendable { let rawValue: UUID }
interfaces.notes: Stable project identity used across persistence, import/export, and UI routing.

interfaces.name: TrackEntryID
interfaces.signature: struct TrackEntryID: Hashable, Codable, Sendable { let rawValue: UUID }
interfaces.notes: Stable identity for reorder, note attachment, and deletion.

interfaces.name: ContributorIdentity
interfaces.signature: struct ContributorIdentity: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var displayName: String; var role: ContributorRole }
interfaces.notes: Minimal collaborator identity for v1 package exchange.

interfaces.name: ContributorRole
interfaces.signature: enum ContributorRole: String, Codable, Sendable { case owner, collaborator }

interfaces.name: OccasionKind
interfaces.signature: enum OccasionKind: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Sendable { case birthday, goodbye, anniversary, newBaby, justBecause }
interfaces.notes: Fixed v1 occasion taxonomy from design decisions.

interfaces.name: ThemeToken
interfaces.signature: enum ThemeToken: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Sendable { case amber, fadedRed, tobacco, charcoal }
interfaces.notes: Stable serialized theme identifier; UI maps this to visuals.

interfaces.name: PackageKind
interfaces.signature: enum PackageKind: String, Codable, Sendable { case keepsake, invite }
interfaces.notes: Set at export time; drives Import Arrival's two intro variants.

interfaces.name: Project
interfaces.signature: struct Project: Identifiable, Codable, Sendable { let id: UUID; var schemaVersion: Int; var title: String; var recipientName: String; var occasion: Occasion; var dedication: String?; var theme: Theme; var tracks: [TrackEntry]; var contributors: [Contributor]; var createdAt: Date; var updatedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: One folder on disk per project; this struct is the versioned manifest JSON at its root.

interfaces.name: CollaborationMode
interfaces.signature: enum CollaborationMode: String, Codable, Sendable { case solo, linearHandoff }
interfaces.notes: V1 explicitly excludes concurrent merge.

interfaces.name: TrackEntry
interfaces.signature: struct TrackEntry: Identifiable, Codable, Sendable { let id: UUID; var catalogID: String; var snapshotTitle: String; var snapshotArtist: String; var artworkFilename: String?; var addedByContributorID: UUID; var note: LinerNote?; var sortIndex: Int }
interfaces.notes: artworkFilename is a relative path to bytes on disk, written at add-time by ProjectEditor.addTrack via ProjectFileStore.writeArtwork, never a remote URL.

interfaces.name: MusicTrackReference
interfaces.signature: struct MusicTrackReference: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var appleMusicSongID: String?; var snapshottedTitle: String; var snapshottedArtist: String; var snapshottedArtworkFilename: String?; var durationSeconds: TimeInterval? }
interfaces.notes: Separates external playback capability from local renderable truth.

interfaces.name: LinerNote
interfaces.signature: struct LinerNote: Identifiable, Codable, Sendable { let id: UUID; var content: LinerNoteContent; var createdAt: Date; var updatedAt: Date }

interfaces.name: TextNote
interfaces.signature: struct TextNote: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var body: String; var createdAt: Date; var updatedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Pure text note payload.

interfaces.name: VoiceNote
interfaces.signature: struct VoiceNote: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var filename: String; var durationSeconds: TimeInterval; var format: VoiceNoteFormat; var createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: References owned local audio asset.

interfaces.name: VoiceNoteFormat
interfaces.signature: enum VoiceNoteFormat: String, Codable, Sendable { case aacMono32kbps, aacMono48kbps }
interfaces.notes: Locked v1 presets to bound file size.

interfaces.name: EntitlementTier
interfaces.signature: enum EntitlementTier: String, Codable, Sendable { case free, paid }

interfaces.name: EntitlementSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct EntitlementSnapshot: Codable, Sendable { var tier: EntitlementTier; var cachedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Gate decisions read this cached value, never a live purchase check at the moment of action.

interfaces.name: EntitlementGateReason
interfaces.signature: enum EntitlementGateReason: String, Codable, Sendable, Error { case projectLimitReached, trackLimitReached, collaboratorsRequirePaid, exportRequiresPaid }
interfaces.notes: Stable reasons surfaced by domain and UI.

interfaces.name: ProjectLimits
interfaces.signature: struct ProjectLimits: Sendable { func canCreateProject(existingProjectCount: Int, entitlement: EntitlementSnapshot) -> Result<Void, EntitlementGateReason>; func canAddTrack(currentTrackCount: Int, entitlement: EntitlementSnapshot) -> Result<Void, EntitlementGateReason>; func canInviteCollaborator(entitlement: EntitlementSnapshot) -> Result<Void, EntitlementGateReason>; func canExport(entitlement: EntitlementSnapshot) -> Result<Void, EntitlementGateReason> }
interfaces.notes: Pure rule engine for local gating.

interfaces.name: ProjectSummary
interfaces.signature: struct ProjectSummary: Codable, Identifiable, Sendable { var id: ProjectID; var title: String; var recipientName: String; var occasion: OccasionKind; var theme: ThemeToken; var annotatedTrackCount: Int; var totalTrackCount: Int; var updatedAt: Date; var packageKind: PackageKind }
interfaces.notes: Shelf and widget-friendly lightweight summary.

interfaces.name: ProjectPackageManifest
interfaces.signature: struct ProjectPackageManifest: Codable, Sendable { var schemaVersion: Int; var packageKind: PackageKind; var project: Project; var exportedAt: Date; var appBuildVersion: String }
interfaces.notes: Same struct backs the Share preview and the Import Arrival read, so preview can never drift from the real export.

interfaces.name: ProjectPersistenceError
interfaces.signature: enum ProjectPersistenceError: Error, Sendable { case notFound; case decodeFailed; case encodeFailed; case atomicWriteFailed; case assetWriteFailed; case assetDeleteFailed }
interfaces.notes: Thrown by ProjectFileStore.

interfaces.name: ProjectImportError
interfaces.signature: enum ProjectImportError: Error, Sendable { case unsupportedSchema; case malformedManifest; case invalidPackageKind; case missingReferencedAsset; case fileTooLarge; case tooManyFiles; case securityValidationFailed }
interfaces.notes: Fail-closed package import errors, thrown by ProjectPackageImporting.

interfaces.name: ProjectFileStore
interfaces.signature: protocol ProjectFileStore: Sendable { func loadLibraryIndex() async throws -> LibraryIndex; func loadProject(id: UUID) async throws -> Project; func save(_ project: Project) async throws; func deleteProject(id: UUID) async throws; func writeArtwork(_ data: Data, projectID: UUID, trackID: UUID) async throws -> String; func writeAudioFile(from tempURL: URL, projectID: UUID, noteID: UUID) async throws -> String; func audioFileURL(projectID: UUID, noteID: UUID) -> URL; func deleteAsset(projectID: UUID, relativeFilename: String) async throws; func sweepOrphanedAssets(projectID: UUID) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Single local-truth persistence boundary; throws ProjectPersistenceError. Package import/export deliberately excluded — see ProjectPackageImporting/Exporting, since untrusted-package handling is a distinct trust boundary.

interfaces.name: MusicCatalogTrack
interfaces.signature: struct MusicCatalogTrack: Identifiable, Sendable { var id: String { catalogID }; let catalogID: String; let title: String; let artist: String; let artworkURL: URL?; let durationSeconds: TimeInterval? }
interfaces.notes: Lightweight search-result row; artworkURL is only for the Add Track results list preview. Adding a track triggers a separate fetch-and-write-to-disk step producing TrackEntry.artworkFilename — the search result itself never carries full image bytes.

interfaces.name: TrackPlaybackAvailability
interfaces.signature: enum TrackPlaybackAvailability: Sendable { case playable; case unavailable(openInAppleMusicURL: URL?) }
interfaces.notes: Drives the playback screen's 'Open in Apple Music' fallback; computed independently of the note experience.

interfaces.name: MusicLibraryProviding
interfaces.signature: protocol MusicLibraryProviding: Sendable { func requestAuthorization() async -> MusicAuthorizationStatus; func search(term: String) async throws -> [MusicCatalogTrack]; func availability(forCatalogID id: String) async -> TrackPlaybackAvailability; func startPlayback(catalogID: String) async throws; func stopPlayback() async }
interfaces.notes: Real impl wraps MusicAuthorization/MusicCatalogSearchRequest/ApplicationMusicPlayer; fake impl returns fixture arrays since real MusicKit is unreliable in Simulator/CI.

interfaces.name: MusicAuthorizationState
interfaces.signature: enum MusicAuthorizationState: Sendable { case notDetermined, authorized, denied, restricted }
interfaces.notes: UI-visible authorization state.

interfaces.name: AudioMeterSample
interfaces.signature: struct AudioMeterSample: Sendable { var power: Float; var timestamp: TimeInterval }
interfaces.notes: Cheap amplitude feed for waveform/spool skin.

interfaces.name: RecordingDraft
interfaces.signature: struct RecordingDraft: Sendable { var fileURL: URL; var durationSeconds: TimeInterval; var meterSamples: [AudioMeterSample] }
interfaces.notes: Temporary captured note before commit into owned storage.

interfaces.name: AudioRecordingError
interfaces.signature: enum AudioRecordingError: Error, Sendable { case permissionDenied; case sessionUnavailable; case startFailed; case interrupted; case finalizeFailed }
interfaces.notes: Thrown by startRecording/stopRecording; distinct from the async events() stream.

interfaces.name: AudioRecording
interfaces.signature: protocol AudioRecording: AnyObject, Sendable { func requestPermission() async -> Bool; func startRecording(to fileURL: URL, maxDuration: TimeInterval) throws; func stopRecording() async throws -> RecordingResult; func cancelRecording(); func events() -> AsyncStream<AudioRecordingEvent> }
interfaces.notes: startRecording must feel instant (<300ms to visible recording state); fake impl can push .interrupted through events() to drive interruptedRecoverable in tests without real hardware.

interfaces.name: EntitlementProviding
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementProviding: Sendable { func currentSnapshot() async -> EntitlementSnapshot; func refreshSnapshot() async -> EntitlementSnapshot; func canCreateAdditionalProject(currentCount: Int) -> Bool; func canAddTrack(currentCount: Int) -> Bool; func canAddCollaborator(currentCount: Int) -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: The boundary-check functions are pure and unit-testable with no StoreKit involved; currentSnapshot/refreshSnapshot are the only async/StoreKit-touching members.

interfaces.name: ExtensionSummaryWriter
interfaces.signature: protocol ExtensionSummaryWriter { func write(summary: ProjectSummary) async throws; func clear(projectID: ProjectID) async throws }
interfaces.notes: App-group summary writer for widget and live activity surfaces.

interfaces.name: ProjectLibrary
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class ProjectLibrary { private(set) var entries: [LibraryIndexEntry]; private(set) var entitlement: EntitlementSnapshot; private(set) var importState: ImportState; func refresh() async; func createProject(title: String, recipientName: String, occasion: Occasion, theme: Theme, dedication: String?) async throws -> Project; func deleteProject(id: UUID) async throws; func importPackage(at url: URL) async throws -> ImportArrivalContext }
interfaces.notes: @Observable requires a class, not a struct; createProject throws EntitlementError.projectLimitReached rather than silently ignoring the free-tier cap.

interfaces.name: NewProjectDraft
interfaces.signature: struct NewProjectDraft: Sendable { var title: String; var recipientName: String; var occasion: OccasionKind; var dedication: String?; var theme: ThemeToken }
interfaces.notes: Creation flow input payload.

interfaces.name: ImportState
interfaces.signature: enum ImportState: Sendable { case idle; case processing; case failed(message: String) }
interfaces.notes: Shelf's transient import-processing/error banner state.

interfaces.name: ProjectEditor
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class ProjectEditor { private(set) var project: Project; private(set) var addTrackState: AddTrackState; private(set) var saveState: SaveState; func addTrack(_ track: MusicCatalogTrack) async throws; func removeTrack(id: UUID) async throws; func moveTrackEarlier(id: UUID) async throws; func moveTrackLater(id: UUID) async throws; func reorderTracks(from source: IndexSet, to destination: Int) async throws; func attachTextNote(trackID: UUID, body: String) async throws; func removeVoiceNote(trackID: UUID) async throws; func beginRecording(trackID: UUID) -> RecordCaptureViewModel; func exportPackage(kind: PackageKind) async throws -> URL }
interfaces.notes: moveTrackEarlier/moveTrackLater and reorderTracks call the identical underlying mutation, satisfying the single-mutation-path accessibility requirement. addTrack throws EntitlementError.trackLimitReached at the 6th track.

interfaces.name: PlaybackScreenState
interfaces.signature: enum PlaybackScreenState: Sendable { case idle; case loadingTrack(TrackEntryID); case playing(TrackEntryID); case unavailable(TrackEntryID, openInAppleMusicURL: URL?); case failed(message: String) }
interfaces.notes: Playback UI never assumes songs resolve.

interfaces.name: SaveState
interfaces.signature: enum SaveState: Sendable { case clean; case dirty; case saving; case failed(message: String) }
interfaces.notes: User-visible autosave feedback surfaced by ProjectEditor.

interfaces.name: RecordingScreenState
interfaces.signature: enum RecordingScreenState: Sendable { case idle; case recording(elapsed: TimeInterval, remaining: TimeInterval, meter: AudioMeterSample?); case interruptedRecoverable; case preview(RecordingDraft); case micDenied; case failed(message: String) }
interfaces.notes: Explicit record flow state machine.

interfaces.name: beginRecordingFlow
interfaces.signature: func beginRecordingFlow(recorder: AudioRecording, maxDuration: TimeInterval) async -> RecordingScreenState
interfaces.notes: Shared resilience helper for starting recording with permission/interruption handling.

interfaces.name: recoverFromInterruption
interfaces.signature: func recoverFromInterruption(editor: ProjectEditor, trackID: TrackEntryID, recorder: AudioRecording) async -> RecordingScreenState
interfaces.notes: Defines the interrupted-recoverable behavior contract.

interfaces.name: validateImportedPackage
interfaces.signature: func validateImportedPackage(at url: URL, maxTotalBytes: Int, maxFileCount: Int) async throws -> ProjectPackageManifest
interfaces.notes: Shared validator called by ProjectPackageImporting.inspect() before any copy into owned storage.

interfaces.name: Occasion
interfaces.signature: enum Occasion: String, Codable, Sendable { case birthday, goodbye, anniversary, newBaby, justBecause }
interfaces.notes: Fixed chip set, not free text.

interfaces.name: Theme
interfaces.signature: enum Theme: String, Codable, Sendable { case amber, fadedRed, tobacco, charcoal }
interfaces.notes: Maps to design token accent set; charcoal is the dark variant.

interfaces.name: LinerNoteContent
interfaces.signature: enum LinerNoteContent: Codable, Sendable { case voice(audioFilename: String, durationSeconds: Double); case text(body: String) }
interfaces.notes: Text and voice are equal-weight variants of one type, never a fallback flag.

interfaces.name: Contributor
interfaces.signature: struct Contributor: Identifiable, Codable, Sendable { let id: UUID; var displayName: String; var role: ContributorRole }

interfaces.name: LibraryIndexEntry
interfaces.signature: struct LibraryIndexEntry: Identifiable, Codable, Sendable { let id: UUID; var title: String; var recipientName: String; var occasion: Occasion; var theme: Theme; var trackCount: Int; var annotatedCount: Int; var isFinished: Bool; var updatedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Cheap shelf-load projection; avoids decoding every full Project on launch.

interfaces.name: LibraryIndex
interfaces.signature: struct LibraryIndex: Codable, Sendable { var entries: [LibraryIndexEntry] }

interfaces.name: SharedProjectSummary
interfaces.signature: struct SharedProjectSummary: Codable, Sendable { var projectID: UUID; var title: String; var recipientName: String; var annotatedCount: Int; var totalCount: Int; var themeToken: String; var isFinished: Bool }
interfaces.notes: The only type the widget/Live Activity extension target ever imports; written via App Group container.

interfaces.name: MusicAuthorizationStatus
interfaces.signature: enum MusicAuthorizationStatus: Sendable { case notDetermined, authorized, denied, restricted }
interfaces.notes: Single canonical name, replacing duplicate MusicAuthorizationState.

interfaces.name: RecordingResult
interfaces.signature: struct RecordingResult: Sendable { let fileURL: URL; let durationSeconds: Double }

interfaces.name: AudioRecordingEvent
interfaces.signature: enum AudioRecordingEvent: Sendable { case levelUpdate(Float); case interrupted; case resumed }
interfaces.notes: interrupted/resumed sourced from AVAudioSession.interruptionNotification, not custom polling.

interfaces.name: AudioPlayback
interfaces.signature: protocol AudioPlayback: AnyObject, Sendable { func play(url: URL) throws; func pause(); func stop() }
interfaces.notes: Used for note playback (voice liner notes), not MusicKit song playback.

interfaces.name: ProjectPackageExporting
interfaces.signature: protocol ProjectPackageExporting: Sendable { func makePackage(for project: Project, kind: PackageKind) async throws -> URL }
interfaces.notes: Returns a URL to the .linernotes-typed directory package; never bundles licensed audio.

interfaces.name: ProjectPackageImporting
interfaces.signature: protocol ProjectPackageImporting: Sendable { func inspect(packageAt url: URL) async throws -> ProjectPackageManifest; func importProject(packageAt url: URL) async throws -> Project }
interfaces.notes: inspect() decodes+validates only (delegates to validateImportedPackage), never opens in place; importProject copies into app storage or throws ProjectImportError on schema/size/type violation.

interfaces.name: WidgetSummaryWriting
interfaces.signature: protocol WidgetSummaryWriting: Sendable { func write(_ summary: SharedProjectSummary) async throws; func writeRecent(_ summaries: [SharedProjectSummary]) async throws; func clear(projectID: UUID) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Writes to the App Group container the widget/Live Activity extension reads from.

interfaces.name: AppEnvironment
interfaces.signature: struct AppEnvironment: Sendable { let musicLibrary: MusicLibraryProviding; let audioRecordingFactory: @Sendable () -> AudioRecording; let audioPlaybackFactory: @Sendable () -> AudioPlayback; let projectFileStore: ProjectFileStore; let entitlement: EntitlementProviding; let packageExporter: ProjectPackageExporting; let packageImporter: ProjectPackageImporting; let widgetSummaryWriter: WidgetSummaryWriting; static func live() -> AppEnvironment; static func fake(fixture: String?) -> AppEnvironment }
interfaces.notes: Composition root selected by -linernotesUITestMode launch argument + LINERNOTES_FIXTURE env var; the DI seam every test tier depends on.

interfaces.name: DebouncedSaveController
interfaces.signature: final class DebouncedSaveController { init(store: ProjectFileStore, debounceMilliseconds: Int = 300); func scheduleSave(_ project: Project); func forceFlush() async }
interfaces.notes: Owned by ProjectEditor; forceFlush is called from one scenePhase observer at app root plus interruption/termination paths.

interfaces.name: AddTrackState
interfaces.signature: enum AddTrackState: Sendable { case authorizing; case denied; case idle; case searching(term: String); case results([MusicCatalogTrack]); case empty(term: String); case blockedByEntitlement }
interfaces.notes: denied state must offer retry, never be a dead end.

interfaces.name: RecordCaptureState
interfaces.signature: enum RecordCaptureState: Sendable { case idle; case recording(elapsedSeconds: Double, level: Float); case interruptedRecoverable(elapsedSeconds: Double); case recordedPreview(durationSeconds: Double); case reRecordConfirm; case textDraft(String); case textSaved(String); case micDenied }
interfaces.notes: interruptedRecoverable must only be reachable via a real AVAudioSession interruption event (or the fake's synthesized one) in tests, never a stub flag.

interfaces.name: RecordCaptureViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class RecordCaptureViewModel { private(set) var state: RecordCaptureState; func startRecording(); func stopAndSave() async throws; func discardRecording(); func switchToText(); func saveText(_ body: String) async throws }
interfaces.notes: startRecording must feel instant (<300ms to visible recording state); re-record path deletes the prior audio file from disk immediately via ProjectFileStore.deleteAsset.

interfaces.name: PlaybackState
interfaces.signature: enum PlaybackState: Sendable { case idle; case loadingTrack(UUID); case playing(UUID); case unavailable(UUID, openInAppleMusicURL: URL?); case failed(message: String) }
interfaces.notes: unavailable never renders as a spinner and always carries a concrete deep link; note audio/text continues regardless of song availability.

interfaces.name: PlaybackViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class PlaybackViewModel { private(set) var state: PlaybackState; private(set) var currentIndex: Int; func play(); func pause(); func advance(to index: Int) }

interfaces.name: ImportArrivalContext
interfaces.signature: struct ImportArrivalContext: Sendable { var manifest: ProjectPackageManifest; var kind: PackageKind }

interfaces.name: ImportArrivalState
interfaces.signature: enum ImportArrivalState: Sendable { case keepsakeIntro(ImportArrivalContext); case contributorIntro(ImportArrivalContext); case failed(reason: String) }
interfaces.notes: failed is fail-closed and non-crashing; never falls through to the track list.

interfaces.name: EntitlementError
interfaces.signature: enum EntitlementError: Error, Sendable { case projectLimitReached; case trackLimitReached; case collaboratorNotAllowed }
interfaces.notes: Thrown by ProjectLibrary/ProjectEditor at the exact action point, driving the contextual PaywallSheet.

interfaces.name: MusicKitMusicLibraryProvider
interfaces.signature: final class MusicKitMusicLibraryProvider: MusicLibraryProviding { }
interfaces.notes: Live implementation wrapping MusicAuthorization + MusicCatalogSearchRequest + ApplicationMusicPlayer.

interfaces.name: AVAudioRecordingService
interfaces.signature: final class AVAudioRecordingService: AudioRecording { }
interfaces.notes: Wraps AVAudioRecorder + AVAudioSession.interruptionNotification; mono AAC 32-48kbps settings fixed here.

interfaces.name: FileManagerProjectStore
interfaces.signature: actor FileManagerProjectStore: ProjectFileStore { }
interfaces.notes: Actor-isolated for off-main file I/O; atomic write-then-rename; owns the orphan-sweep implementation.

interfaces.name: StoreKitEntitlementProvider
interfaces.signature: final class StoreKitEntitlementProvider: EntitlementProviding { }
interfaces.notes: Built against a local .storekit config; boundary logic itself is must-have, live purchase wiring is out of scope.

interfaces.name: FakeServiceDoubles
interfaces.signature: enum FakeServices { static func musicLibrary(fixture: String?) -> MusicLibraryProviding; static func audioRecording() -> AudioRecording; static func projectFileStore(inMemory: Bool) -> ProjectFileStore; static func entitlement(tier: EntitlementTier) -> EntitlementProviding }
interfaces.notes: Backs both unit tests and the -linernotesUITestMode XCUITest seam; fake AudioRecording can synthesize .interrupted via events().

interfaces.name: SchemaMigrator
interfaces.signature: protocol SchemaMigrator: Sendable { func migrate(rawJSON: Data, fromVersion: Int) throws -> Project }
interfaces.notes: Fail-closed: unrecognized/future schema versions throw rather than attempt a best-effort partial decode.

interfaces.name: AccessibilityReorderActions
interfaces.signature: extension View { func trackReorderActions(moveEarlier: @escaping () -> Void, moveLater: @escaping () -> Void) -> some View }
interfaces.notes: Applies the custom VoiceOver 'Move earlier'/'Move later' accessibility actions, calling the same ProjectEditor methods as drag.

interfaces.name: ReducedMotionFallback
interfaces.signature: extension EnvironmentValues { var linernotesReduceMotion: Bool { get } }
interfaces.notes: Wraps accessibilityReduceMotion; every spool/flip/breathing animation branches on this with a static/cross-fade fallback.

interfaces.name: FakeServices
interfaces.signature: enum FakeServices { static func musicLibrary(fixture: String?) -> MusicLibraryProviding; static func audioRecording() -> AudioRecording; static func audioPlayback() -> AudioPlayback; static func projectFileStore(inMemory: Bool) -> ProjectFileStore; static func entitlement(tier: EntitlementTier) -> EntitlementProviding; static func packageExporter() -> ProjectPackageExporting; static func packageImporter() -> ProjectPackageImporting; static func widgetSummaryWriter() -> WidgetSummaryWriting }
interfaces.notes: Backs both unit tests and the -linernotesUITestMode XCUITest seam.
